title: notandvm's emissive sculk!
description: adds emissives to all sculk-related blocks/items! (because for some reason no one else has)
body:
##
[CONTINUITY](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) OR ALTERNATIVES THAT ENABLE EMISSIVE & ANIMATED TEXTURES ARE REQUIRED FOR THIS PACK TO FUNCTION

this simple resource pack adds emissives to all sculk-related blocks and items, of which include: ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/d4Vebidc/images/05b63e0538e485d4a001221503730ce799cc23e9.png) > **BLOCKS:** sculk, sculk sensor, calibrated sculk sensor, sculk catalyst, sculk shrieker, sculk veins > **ITEMS:** echo shard, disc fragment, recovery compass, disc 5
